# Join Our Live Workshop - WooCommerce Growth Hack to Boost Sales

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-07 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 821

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Want to make more eCommerce sales?

Many common growth strategies, such as paid ads, require you to
make an upfront investment. Since conversions aren't guaranteed
with paid ads, this means sometimes you lose more money than you
make.

What if I told you that you can get people to promote your
store... and you only pay them a small fee AFTER you’ve actually
made the money?

Yes… You can get the sales before you pay anything!

We'll show you exactly how creating your own affiliate program
can help you make more sales! Join our FREE live workshop
on Wednesday, 18 Jun 2025, 10:30 AM, EST.

👉 [Workshop] Growth Hack: Get More Sales with an Affiliate
Program ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CEi-T5RcSyCGKLorImT9VzGPgvgfGx1QpLZxTb2lL0Y )

Here's what you'll learn:

- Why Affiliates Drive More Sales (For Less Money)

- Launch Your Program Easily in WordPress

- Find Your First 10 Affiliates (They're Closer Than You Think)

- Snag Your Swag Bag & Get Your Affiliate Program Live

The best part? We'll also host a live Q&A session 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CEi-T5RcSyCGKLorImT9VzGPgvgfGx1QpLZxTb2lL0Y ) at the end of
the workshop where Ryan Priddey, your Workshop Host, will answer
all your affiliate program questions.

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
